<!--
This file auto-populates the description box every time someone opens a PR.
A good template makes reviews faster: the reviewer knows what changed, why,
and how it was checked — without having to ask.
-->

## What & why
<!-- One or two sentences. What does this change do, and what problem does it solve? -->

Closes ENG-XXXX  <!-- linking the ticket auto-closes it on merge -->

## How it was tested
<!-- "Added unit tests for X", "ran locally against Y", screenshots, etc. -->

## Reviewer notes
<!-- Anything that helps the reviewer: tricky bits, things you're unsure about,
     areas you specifically want eyes on. -->

## Checklist
- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] CI is green
- [ ] No secrets, keys or PII committed
- [ ] Change is small enough to review in one sitting
